since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.20%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.14% · BTC +0.36% · Gold +1.46% · Nasdaq100 -0.51%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.20%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.20%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.36%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.36%, PUBM +7.56%, APP +7.46%, DV +7.19%, MGNI +7.13%. Laggards: TER -7.72%, VRT -6.55%, NXPI -6.48%, HPE -6.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.69% at $155.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
